title: Built a live scalping signal dashboard – looking for feedback
author: Imaginary_Past_1382
selftext:
I’ve been working on a web app that scans hundreds of coins and generates live scalping signals (long/short, speed, score, TP/SL tracking).

The goal is to simplify fast decision-making for day trading.

Currently tracking:

* 300+ coins
* Signal strength scoring
* Live updates
* TP/SL tracking

Would love honest feedback from traders 🙏  
What would you improve or add?

comments.author: theTraveler_2
comments.body: share the link, hard to give feedback without live testing it

replies.author: Imaginary_Past_1382
replies.body: dont know can i share the link here?

comments.author: Usual_Oil1390
comments.body: It's best to try it out if possible

replies.author: Imaginary_Past_1382
replies.body: im still working on it but sure i can share :)

comments.author: opmfirminc
comments.body: Yea, it looks good and it seems like it’s working well so far at 4-0 but hard to really tell based on a screenshot and only 4 trades. I recommend at least 100 tests before letting it go wild in order to make sure there’s no bugs or errors. One error in the code could wipe out your whole account. Please feel free to DM ME to discuss it more

replies.author: Imaginary_Past_1382
replies.body: Sure thanks i go 183 trades a day its now over 80% hitrate

comments.author: agamtyagi
comments.body: hit me up, i have friends who have made a very similar startup…can help with feedback and improvements…dm me :)
